books.title: Walden
books.author: Henry David Thoreau
books.description: Two years alone beside a Massachusetts pond — a manifesto for deliberate living.

chapters.title: Where I Lived, and What I Lived For

books.title: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea
books.author: Jules Verne
books.description: Something vast and luminous is moving through the world's oceans — and no one can explain it. A Victorian thriller from the father of science fiction.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: One summer in Long Island's gilded world — a Jazz Age fable of money, longing, and the lies we tell ourselves.
